description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and check, and set GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. In the build stage add a cargo_test job using the rust:slim Docker image, run apt-get update and apt-get install -y cmake openssl libssl-dev git pkg-config zlib1g zlib1g-dev in before_script, then execute cargo test, and archive the target directory and Cargo.lock as artifacts. In the check stage add a fmt_and_clippy job that depends on cargo_test, uses the rustlang/rust:nightly-slim image, runs apt-get update and apt-get install -y cmake openssl libssl-dev git pkg-config zlib1g zlib1g-dev followed by rustup component add clippy-preview and rustup component add rustfmt-preview, then runs cargo fmt -- --check and cargo clippy -- -D clippy, and also stores the target directory and Cargo.lock as artifacts.
